{{Quote|You are ordered to evacuate the planetary garrison to the last man, at best possible speed, using any and all ships that are spaceworthy. Destroy the repair yard and any and all remaining assets before withdrawing from the system.|Imperial orders received by Jian Paret|<ref name="Before the Storm" />}}
'''Jian Paret''' was a [[Human/Legends|human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Commander/Legends|military officer]] seving the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], eight months after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], he was serving with [[Sixth Negative Regions|Black Sword Command]] at [[N'zoth]].

==Biography==
===Early life===
Paret was the [[Commander/Legends|commander]] of the [[Black Fleet]] stationed at the [[Sixth Negative Regions]] located within the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].<ref name="Before the Storm" />

===Evacuating N'zoth===
{{Quote|You are vermin.|Nil Spaar, just before executing Jian Paret|<ref name="Before the Storm" />}}
After the battle of Endor, Paret served as the commanding officer within the [[Sixth Negative Regions]].
At this time, Paret was the ranking officer at N'zoth, and it was he, and not [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Crollick]], who was ordered to supervise the evacuation to the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]]. He was evidently the commander of the garrison's [[Legion/Legends|legion]] of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]], but inasmuch as the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] guardship [[Harridan (starship)|''Harridan'']] had been withdrawn three weeks earlier, it is not clear whether in normal circumstances he would have had authority over the [[Black Fifteen]] shipyard, or the [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] [[Intimidator (Executor-class)|''Intimidator'']], fitting out at the docks.<ref name="Before the Storm" />

Commander Paret's plans were foiled by a revolt among the native [[Yevetha]], led by [[Nil Spaar]]. Seizing ''Intimidator'' and the shipyards, the Yevetha forced him to watch as they turned the big ship's guns on the shuttles carrying the twenty thousand Imperials of the garrison and the associated administrative cantonment. Nil Spaar then executed him in turn.<ref name="Before the Storm" />

==Behind the scenes==
The size of the stormtrooper force in Paret's command is inferred from [[Davith Sconn]]'s statement in ''[[Shield of Lies]]'' that half the Imperial presence on N'zoth itself consisted of the white-armored shock-troops.
